title: Roasted Uruguayan San-marzano-tomato Casserole
description: A hearty weeknight Uruguayan dish featuring roasted San-marzano tomatoes, crispy onions, and a tamasic-friendly spice blend.
instructions: Toss tomatoes with 2 tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Spread onions in a single layer on a separate baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes, or until crispy.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tbsp olive oil over medium-high heat. Add ground beef and cook until browned, breaking into small pieces as it cooks.
Add cumin, paprika, and salt to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Transfer the beef mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with roasted tomatoes and crispy onions.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and bubbly.
Let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro, if desired.
Serve hot, garnished with additional crispy onions and a sprinkle of paprika, if desired.
